vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a severe discrepancy between the A Priori Registry and the physical reality of the desk environment.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No String of Nickels visible; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No Mexican Mint visible; soil appears barren.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos is absent; only the white rabbit anchor remains in the pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No Silver Guest visible.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. Soil surface shows no signs of vegetative life.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty. Soil surface shows no signs of vegetative life.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains only the white rabbit (5cm) scale anchor. No Pothos foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty. No evidence of Silver Guest or Mexican Mint.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp, and seemingly undisturbed across all pots.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit figurine in P3 is the only non-soil element. No fungal growth or debris observed.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: Across the 5-day sequence, there is zero change in the biological state of the pots. The environment is static and devoid of plant life.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. All registered specimens are missing or have been removed, leaving only the substrate and the scale anchor.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the expected flora. The pots are effectively 'dead' or 'decommissioned' containers.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish the baseline registry and compare it against the visual evidence in each frame. After validating the contents of each pot, I have concluded that the biome is currently empty of all plant life. The pots contain only soil and, in the case of P3, a white rabbit figurine. There is no evidence of growth, decay, or recent activity; the state of the pots is identical from the earliest image to the current one.
